creator: olgeni@uli.it
text:
Oops.

Erlang requires nawk to build (see lib/snmp/bin/snmp-v2tov1).

Emacs' erlang-mode does not like compressed man pages and should be
patched to support them. So, they are installed uncompressed in this
version of the port.

Apply this patch after the first diff file and it should get better :-)

diff -rcN erlang.1/Makefile erlang/Makefile
*** erlang.1/Makefile   Sat Jul  8 15:13:49 2000
--- erlang/Makefile     Sat Jul  8 14:11:00 2000
***************
*** 23,29 ****
  MAINTAINER=   seb@strollo.org
  
  # Make sure jdk is available (see use below)
! BUILD_DEPENDS=  ${JAVABINDIR}/javac:${PORTSDIR}/java/jdk
  
  # Don't clutter up /usr/ports/distfiles with all distfiles (including
patches)
  DIST_SUBDIR=  erlang
--- 23,30 ----  
  MAINTAINER=   seb@strollo.org
  
  # Make sure jdk is available (see use below)
! BUILD_DEPENDS=  ${JAVABINDIR}/javac:${PORTSDIR}/java/jdk \
!                 nawk:${PORTSDIR}/lang/nawk
                  
  # Don't clutter up /usr/ports/distfiles with all distfiles (including
patches)
  DIST_SUBDIR=  erlang
*************** 
*** 39,44 ****
--- 40,47 ----
  USE_PERL5=    yes
  GNU_CONFIGURE=        yes
  CONFIGURE_TARGET=     # empty
+ NOMANCOMPRESS=        yes
+ MANCOMPRESSED=        no

  STRIP=
